nodes.name: Write Patch Webhook
nodes.notes: Claude (via MCP or manual) POSTs patch here. STUPInD picks it up on next Pull.

endpoints.push: POST /webhook/stupind-push  — STUPInD pushes task snapshot here
endpoints.pull: GET  /webhook/stupind-pull  — STUPInD polls for Claude's pending updates
endpoints.patch: POST /webhook/stupind-patch — Claude POSTs task updates here

how_to_use_from_claude_chat: 1. In STUPInD → Settings → Claude Integration, enter your n8n Push and Pull URLs
2. Click 'Push to Claude' — this sends your full task list to n8n
3. In this Claude chat, paste your tasks or ask Claude to fetch them via n8n MCP
4. Claude analyzes and POSTs a patch to /webhook/stupind-patch
5. Click 'Pull Updates' in STUPInD — updates apply instantly
